prompt: Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor

inputData.question: Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor"},"startedAt":1771856018571,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks to compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor. I need to join the professors table with course_sections (which links professors to courses) and count distinct courses per professor. The schema shows: professors (id, first_name, last_name), course_sections (professor_id, course_id), and courses (id, code, name). I'll group by professor and count distinct course_ids, ordering by count descending for easy comparison.","sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cs.course_id) AS distinct_courses_taught
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_taught DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
","assumptions":["Professors with no course sections will appear with 0 distinct courses taught","A distinct course is counted once per professor regardless of how many sections they teach","Results are ordered by number of courses (descending) for easy comparison"]},"endedAt":1771856047573},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_taught DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
"},"startedAt":1771856047576,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

ORDER BY distinct_courses_taught DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name Courses"}},"width":600,"height":800}},"startedAt":1771856050827,"status":"success","output":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cs.course_id) AS distinct_courses_taught
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id

visualization.title: Number of Distinct Courses Taught by Each Professor

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cs.course_id) AS distinct_courses_taught
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_taught DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC

visualization.title: Number of Distinct Courses Taught by Each Professor

result.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cs.course_id) AS distinct_courses_taught
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_taught DESC, p.last_name ASC, p.first_name ASC
